# Disability Categories

**Part:** Part 2  
**Generated by:** `scripts/generate_parts.py` (A.12 reassembly, stub-capable)  
**Source DB fingerprint:** `3d7fb5d50de6`

---


22 populations are represented. Categories group related functional profiles; no category or population is ranked above another (D-NAV-006).


## Category: cognitive

### `DEM` — dementia
Alzheimer disease and related dementias

### `PCS` — post-concussion syndrome
Persistent symptoms after concussion or traumatic brain injury


## Category: developmental

### `ADHD` — attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder · parent `NDV`
ADHD

### `AUT` — autism
Autism spectrum

### `NDV` — neurodivergence (broad)
Broad neurodivergent category; includes AUT, ADHD, and others


## Category: general

### `ALL` — applies universally to all populations
Item is not population-specific; applies to everyone


## Category: mental_health

### `MH` — mental health condition
Mood, anxiety, trauma, psychotic disorders affecting environmental tolerance


## Category: mobility

### `MOB` — mobility impairment (general)
General mobility limitation including walking, balance, or wheeled mobility

### `SCI` — spinal cord injury · parent `MOB`
Spinal cord injury, paraplegia or tetraplegia

### `UPL` — upper-limb impairment
Limitation affecting one or both arms/hands; reach and grip differences


## Category: neurological

### `EPI` — epilepsy · parent `NEU`
Epilepsy and seizure disorders; photosensitivity is a relevant subtype

### `MS` — multiple sclerosis · parent `NEU`
Multiple sclerosis; thermoregulation, fatigue, motor and sensory involvement

### `NEU` — neurological (general)
General neurological category; includes MS, epilepsy, Parkinson, stroke sequelae


## Category: pain_fatigue

### `CFS` — chronic fatigue syndrome / ME · parent `OFS`
ME/CFS — post-exertional malaise; severe energy limitation

### `MCAS` — mast cell activation syndrome · parent `OFS`
MCAS — sensitivities to environmental triggers including VOCs, scents, temperature

### `OFS` — orthostatic/fatigue spectrum
Umbrella for orthostatic intolerance, dysautonomia, and chronic fatigue conditions

### `PAIN` — chronic pain
Chronic pain conditions; sustained discomfort affecting endurance and posture

### `POTS` — postural tachycardia syndrome · parent `OFS`
POTS — heart rate dysregulation on standing; intolerance to sustained upright posture


## Category: sensory

### `DBL` — deafblindness · *compound*
Combined vision and hearing impairment; co-occurring sensory loss

### `DEAF` — hearing impairment / Deaf
Hard of hearing, Deaf, or late-deafened

### `SENS` — sensory processing differences
Sensory hypersensitivity or hyposensitivity; often co-occurs with NDV/AUT

### `VIS` — vision impairment
Low vision or blindness
